title: Ex- SriLankan Airlines Chief Executive Officer Kapila Chandrasena  arrested by the Commission to Investigate Allegations of Bribery or Corruption (CIABOC) over the alleged acceptance of a USD 2 million bribe linked to the Airbus aircraft procurement deal
body_paragraphs: Former SriLankan Airlines Chief Executive Officer Kapila Chandrasena has been arrested by the Commission to Investigate Allegations of Bribery or Corruption (CIABOC) over the alleged acceptance of a USD 2 million bribe linked to the Airbus aircraft procurement deal.
Chandrasena arrived at the Bribery Commission this morning to provide a statement, and after recording a lengthy statement with investigators, he was taken into custody.
